title: mentha leonis
intro: Mentha leonis, also known as Lion's Mint, is a perennial plant that belongs to the mint family and is native to the Iberian Peninsula. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can be attributed to its high concentration of essential oils, particularly menthol and menthone. The health benefits of Mentha leonis include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and alleviate respiratory problems such as coughs and colds. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
